# phase_tools-rs CLI help

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, comment = "", collapse = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath("..", mustWork = TRUE))

run_cmd <- function(cmd, args = character()) {
  if (!file.exists(cmd) && !nzchar(Sys.which(cmd))) {
    return(sprintf(
      "%s not found. Run `make release` before rendering docs/cli.md.",
      cmd
    ))
  }
  out <- suppressWarnings(system2(cmd, args, stdout = TRUE, stderr = TRUE))
  status <- attr(out, "status")
  if (!is.null(status) && status != 0) {
    out <- c(out, sprintf("[exit status %s]", status))
  }
  paste(out, collapse = "\n")
}

run_tool <- function(cmd, args = "--help") {
  run_cmd(cmd, args)
}

phase_mnv_rs <- file.path("target", "release", "phase_mnv_rs")
phase_compare <- file.path("target", "release", "phase_compare")
unphase_vcf <- file.path("target", "release", "unphase_vcf")
fermi_lite_assemble <- file.path("target", "release", "fermi_lite_assemble")
bam_error_model <- file.path("target", "release", "bam_error_model")
phase_adjudicate <- file.path("target", "release", "phase_adjudicate")
bam_contamination <- file.path("target", "release", "bam_contamination")
bam_ancestry <- file.path("target", "release", "bam_ancestry")

fence <- function(x) {
  cat("```text\n")
  cat(x)
  cat("\n```\n")
}
```

This file is generated from `docs/cli.Rmd` by `make readme`. It mirrors the
`--help` text from the current release binaries.

## `phase_mnv_rs`

```{r rust-help, results='asis'}
fence(run_tool(phase_mnv_rs))
```

## `phase_compare`

```{r phase-compare-help, results='asis'}
fence(run_tool(phase_compare))
```

## `unphase_vcf`

```{r unphase-help, results='asis'}
fence(run_tool(unphase_vcf))
```

## `fermi_lite_assemble`

```{r fermi-lite-help, results='asis'}
fence(run_tool(fermi_lite_assemble))
```

## `bam_error_model`

```{r bam-error-model-help, results='asis'}
fence(run_tool(bam_error_model))
```

## `phase_adjudicate`

```{r phase-adjudicate-help, results='asis'}
fence(run_tool(phase_adjudicate))
```

## `bam_contamination`

```{r bam-contamination-help, results='asis'}
fence(run_tool(bam_contamination))
```

## `bam_ancestry`

```{r bam-ancestry-help, results='asis'}
fence(run_tool(bam_ancestry))
```
